Decoding Non-Linear Gold Price Transmission to Sectoral Equities

A Regime-Switching Machine Learning Approach

This framework combines Gaussian HMM regime detection with regime-specific XGBoost models to capture non-linear transmission from gold-linked signals into Indian sectoral equity returns. Regimes are inferred from macro-financial state variables, then bank-sector forecasts are converted into tradeable long, short, or flat positions in the 2023-2024 out-of-sample window.

Section 2 - Dataset & Regime Detection

RegimeCount%Avg VIXAvg Return
Crisis71929.38%22.910.0013
Late_Cycle77331.59%16.650.0002
Expansion95539.03%12.860.0008
Key insight: 3 distinct market regimes detected via Gaussian HMM.
Dataset rows: 2830. Test window: 2023-01-01 onward, with 521 aligned forecast rows after next-day return shifting.

Section 4 - Core Hypothesis: Gold's Role by Regime

RegimeGold SHAP rankTop featureInterpretation
Crisis#13bank_spreadLiquidity dominates in full crisis
Late_Cycle#2india_vixGold is direct fear signal pre-crisis
Expansion#4momentumGold provides structural signal

Gold transitions from predictive signal (Late_Cycle) to concurrent stress indicator (Crisis) as market stress deepens.

Gold SHAP ratio Late_Cycle vs Expansion: 1.67x.

Global Model37.12%16.50%6.02%1.9104-4.26%3.872540.45%81

Sharpe comparison: Regime Model = 6.3318, Global Model = 1.9104, Buy & Hold = 0.5777.

Section 6 - Conclusions

  • Regime-aware modeling materially improves predictive accuracy over a single global bank model, with clear gains in the best regime-specific segment.
  • Gold is most informative in the Late_Cycle state, where it behaves as a forward-looking fear signal rather than a purely contemporaneous crisis marker.
  • The backtest provides an economic validation layer by testing whether forecast improvements survive realistic trade filtering and transaction costs.

Limitations: the test window is still modest in size, Crisis observations remain sparse relative to Expansion, and FMCG/Metal strategies could not be included because the underlying targets and saved models are unavailable.
